text: You are on watch at night in port and discover a fire in #1 hatch. Which action should you take FIRST?

options.text: A) Advise the Chief Mate and Master
B) Release carbon dioxide into the hatch
D) Lead a fire hose to the hatch

explanation: Sounding the general alarm is the highest priority to alert the entire crew, initiate the mustering process, and organize the response team.
